# openshift_image_mirror (Resource)

Runs oc mirror to sync images to a disconnected registry.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pull_secret_file` (String) Path to pull-secret.json for source registry authentication.
- `registry_url` (String) Target mirror registry URL (e.g. registry.example.com:5000).

### Optional

- `additional_images` (List of String) Additional container images to mirror.
- `dry_run` (Boolean) Perform a dry run without actually mirroring.
- `mirror_dir` (String) Local directory for disk-to-disk mirroring.
- `oc_binary` (String) Path to oc binary. Overrides provider setting.
- `operators` (Attributes List) Operator catalogs to mirror. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operators))
- `release_channel` (String) OCP release channel (e.g. stable-4.14).
- `release_versions` (List of String) Specific OCP release versions to mirror.
- `skip_missing` (Boolean) Skip missing images instead of failing.
- `storage_backend_s3` (Attributes) S3 storage backend for oc mirror. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--storage_backend_s3))

### Read-Only

- `image_content_sources` (Attributes List) Parsed imageContentSources from oc mirror output. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--image_content_sources))
- `mapping_file` (String) Path to the generated mapping.txt file.

<a id="nestedatt--operators"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operators`

Required:

- `catalog` (String)

Optional:

- `packages` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operators--packages))

<a id="nestedatt--operators--packages"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operators.packages`

Required:

- `name` (String)

Optional:

- `channels` (List of String)
- `max_version` (String)
- `min_version` (String)



<a id="nestedatt--storage_backend_s3"></a>
### Nested Schema for `storage_backend_s3`

Required:

- `bucket` (String)
- `endpoint` (String)

Optional:

- `access_key` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive)


<a id="nestedatt--image_content_sources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `image_content_sources`

Read-Only:

- `mirrors` (List of String)
- `source` (String)
